name: Linguine Primaver Della Santa Maria
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Chunky tomatoes with red peppers and Italian seasoning (contadina)
2 teaspoons Chopped fresh basil or 1 teaspoon Dried basil, crushed
Optional: Sliced ripe olives and chopped fresh basil for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet.
2. Saute shallots and garlic for 1 minute.
3. Add zucchini, yellow squash, and bell pepper; saute for 3-4 minutes.
4. Stir in the chunky tomatoes with red peppers and Italian seasoning, tomato paste, white wine, and salt; simmer for 5-8 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Stir in basil; simmer for an additional minute.
6. Cook linguine according to package directions.
7. Pour sauce over pasta; garnish with sliced ripe olives and chopped fresh basil, if desired.
